text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Supervising trainer confirmed. Greetings, Trainer.
I am Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The goal: to become Triple Crown champion. This
is both my own ambition and my father's dream.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Preparations for achieving the goal are complete.
Please commence training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
